list.name: symbol
list.query: SELECT 'ALL' AS __text, 'ALL' AS __value UNION ALL SELECT symbol AS __text, symbol AS __value FROM analysis_runs ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT computed_at AS time, directional_accuracy AS "DA" FROM signal_metrics WHERE horizon_hours = $horizon_hours AND window_days = $window_days AND (symbol = '$symbol' OR ('$symbol' = 'ALL' AND symbol IS NULL)) ORDER BY computed_at

SELECT computed_at AS time, information_coefficient AS "IC" FROM signal_metrics WHERE horizon_hours = $horizon_hours AND window_days = $window_days AND (symbol = '$symbol' OR ('$symbol' = 'ALL' AND symbol IS NULL)) ORDER BY computed_at

SELECT computed_at AS time, simulated_pnl AS "PnL" FROM signal_metrics WHERE horizon_hours = $horizon_hours AND window_days = $window_days AND (symbol = '$symbol' OR ('$symbol' = 'ALL' AND symbol IS NULL)) ORDER BY computed_at

SELECT total_predictions FROM signal_metrics WHERE horizon_hours = $horizon_hours AND window_days = $window_days AND (symbol = '$symbol' OR ('$symbol' = 'ALL' AND symbol IS NULL)) ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT avg_confidence_correct AS "Correct", avg_confidence_incorrect AS "Incorrect" FROM signal_metrics WHERE horizon_hours = $horizon_hours AND window_days = $window_days AND (symbol = '$symbol' OR ('$symbol' = 'ALL' AND symbol IS NULL)) ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol) symbol AS "Symbol", total_predictions AS "N", directional_accuracy AS "DA", information_coefficient AS "IC", simulated_pnl AS "PnL", computed_at AS "Computed At" FROM signal_metrics WHERE horizon_hours = $horizon_hours AND window_days = $window_days AND symbol IS NOT NULL ORDER BY symbol, computed_at DESC

SELECT date_trunc('day', ar.triggered_at) AS time, count(*) AS "Predictions" FROM analysis_runs ar JOIN trading_decisions td ON td.run_id = ar.id WHERE (ar.symbol = '$symbol' OR '$symbol' = 'ALL') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT ar.symbol AS "Symbol", td.action AS "Action", td.confidence AS "Confidence", o.actual_return AS "Actual Return", o.correct AS "Correct", o.evaluated_at AS "Evaluated At" FROM outcomes o JOIN trading_decisions td ON td.id = o.decision_id JOIN analysis_runs ar ON ar.id = td.run_id WHERE o.horizon_hours = $horizon_hours AND (ar.symbol = '$symbol' OR '$symbol' = 'ALL') ORDER BY o.evaluated_at DESC LIMIT 100
